use_cases: Display loading progress for file uploads or data fetching operations
Show task completion percentage in project management dashboards
Indicate multi-step form progress in onboarding flows
Visualize skill levels or profile completion percentages
Track upload/download progress in media applications
ai_summary: A flexible progress indicator component supporting both linear and circular variants with multiple visual styles, sizes, and smooth animations. Built with Radix UI primitives and motion/react for accessible, animated progress visualization suitable for dashboards, forms, and loading states across various industries.
